title: Xbox Reviews Scraper
description: Scrape user reviews from Xbox game store pages. Provide game URLs to extract reviews including ratings, text, dates, and reviewer information.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to Xbox game store pages to scrape reviews from. Example: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/arc-raiders/9NDF1F263RZ4/0010

maxReviewsPerUrl.title: Maximum reviews per URL
maxReviewsPerUrl.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per game URL. Leave empty to collect all available reviews.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy for reliable scraping (Residential recommended for Xbox).
